summary: The footage shows a first-person view from inside a vehicle traveling along a multi-laned road under clear skies. Vehicles are seen moving ahead in both directions. Cars pass by on either side of the road, including a white sedan overtaking from the left.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are traveling on a multi-laned road, with cars passing by on both sides.

uncertainties: Exact positions of all vehicles cannot be determined due to limited visibility.
Speed readings may vary slightly across frames.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles.
